sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَتْ شَبَكَةُ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ الطُّلَّابَ عَلَى التَّعَلُّمِ عَنْ بُعْدٍ.
sentences.translation: Internet mreža je pomogla učenicima u učenju na daljinu.
sentences.translationEn: The internet has helped students learn remotely.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ التَّلَامِيذُ الدُّرُوسَ عَبْرَ شَاشَاتِ الْحَاسُوبِ فِي مَنَازِلِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su pratili lekcije putem kompjuterskih ekrana u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: The pupils attended lessons via computer screens in their homes.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْوَسِيلَةُ تَمْنَحُ الْجَمِيعَ فُرْصَةً لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى الْمَعْرِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova metoda svima pruža priliku za pristup znanju.
sentences.translationEn: This method gives everyone an opportunity to access knowledge.
